calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Chris P. Alexandar, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Avalon at Diamond Heights, L.P.
Richard Brautigam, Commumnity Manager for plaintiff Avalon at Diamond Heights, L.P., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Herman Holland.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 23, 2018.
Defendant Herman Holland's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 12, 2018.
DOE defendants were dimissed on March 23, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on March 28, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Avalon at Diamond Heights, L.P., and against defendant Herman Holland, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $673.00.
Holdover Damages - $1.017.52.
Attorney Fees - $790.00.
Costs - $360.00.

Total - $2,840.52.

Additionally, plaintiff Avalon at Diamond Heights, L.P. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 5235 Diamond Heights Boulevard, #318, San Francisco, CA 94131.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Avalon at Diamond Heights, LP is present, represented by Rich Brantigan.
Attorney Daniel Riley for the plaintiff.
Defendant Herman Holland is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of April 16, 2018 remains on calendar.

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-28-2018 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-28-2018 Text Ruling
